MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS WTAS LLC & JOHN MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Continued on the court's own motion to March 13, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-09-2013 Continued To Mar-20-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Kenneth G. Hausman of ARNOLD & PORTER, LLP appearing for defendants / moving parties WTAS LLC and John Mullen
William M. Lukens of LUKENS LAW GROUP (415-433-3000), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing party Richard T. Thieriot


RULING:
DEFENDANTS WTAS LLC AND JOHN MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT

Argued. The Court's ruling is as follows: Defendants' general demurrers to the 1st, 2nd and 3rd cause of action and to the complaint as a whole are overruled. Defendants' special demurrers to the 1st, 2nd and 3rd cause of action are sustained with 10 days leave to amend by the plaintiff to plead facts showing when plaintiff discovered the alleged breaches. The Court finds the plaintiff has properly alleged actual injury in this case. Prevailing party to submit the order. Judge: Cynthia M. Lee, Clerk: JIRoque, Matter not reported. (206)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Continued To Nov-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. WILLIAM M. LUKENS OF LUKENS LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. 433-3000 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KENNETH G. HAUSMAN OF ARNOLD & PORTER LLP, TEL. NO. 471-3155 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - JUDGE MARLA MILLER MADE A DISCLOSURE REGARDING HER FORMER AFFILIATION WITH THE HOWARD & RICE LAW FIRM IN WHICH MR. HAUSMAN AND MR. SCHENKKAN ARE ALSO PARTNERS. SHE DOES NOT VIEW THIS AS A BASIS FOR HER RECUSAL. MR. LUKENS EXCERCISED HIS CCP 170.6 CHALLENGE TO JUDGE MILLER AND WAS GRANTED. DEFENDANTS WTAS LLC AND JOHN MULLEN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 AND WILL BE HEARD ON NOVEMBER 29, 2012 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 206. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 = (302/MJM)
